title: Assembly-pinned candidate gene intervals
description: Resolve ranked gene hypotheses to one assembly-specific genomic span per gene while retaining missing and ambiguous interval states. A known gene available only on another assembly fails the operation.

resolvers.title: DuckDB file scan
resolvers.description: Read a local interval snapshot into a DuckDB table.

resolvers.title: DuckDB SQL materialization
resolvers.description: Materialize a declared read-only SQL relation.

operations.title: Resolve candidate genes to assembly-pinned intervals
operations.description: Resolve every ranked hypothesis to a genomic span or an explicit missing or ambiguous-locus state; fail on an assembly mismatch.
